case_title: State of Maharashtra v. Rajan (Cyber Fraud)
subject: Cyber fraud and identity theft
key_holdings: Digital evidence admissible under Section 65B of Evidence Act
IP address logs constitute valid electronic evidence
Combined charges under IT Act and IPC permissible

subject: Cruelty and dowry death
key_holdings: Cruelty need not be only physical — mental cruelty sufficient
Dowry death presumption under 304B applies when conditions met
Living separately does not negate cruelty allegations

subject: Dacoity with weapons
key_holdings: Common intention established through coordinated attack
Presence of weapons enhances offence to dacoity
Each member liable for acts of all in furtherance of common intention
